mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rate increases discount rates, compressing equity valuations and driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of periods when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden spike in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals labor market deterioration, triggering immediate risk-off selling and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.5%, or t-statistic for return difference is insignificant at 95% confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad consumer demand contraction, leading to corporate earnings downgrades and negative quarterly equity returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both decline MoM
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >60% of periods when both series decline month-over-month, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 2% year-over-year during inflationary periods signals capacity constraints and supply bottlenecks, prompting central bank tightening expectations and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of periods when INDPRO YoY growth exceeds 2% during CPIAUCSL > 5%, or regime-split IC shows no directional advantage.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with a flat or declining federal funds rate creates a negative real rate environment, eroding purchasing power and triggering negative equity returns as markets price in delayed tightening.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of periods when real rates turn more negative, or joint proxy signal fails to beat single-proxy baseline in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls above 300,000 per month signals robust economic expansion and rising corporate revenues, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >55% of periods when PAYEMS MoM exceeds 300,000, or rolling Sharpe ratio of the signal remains below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP contraction below 0% triggers recession fears, causing immediate portfolio de-risking and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of periods following a negative GDPC1 QoQ reading, or event-study cumulative abnormal returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where industrial production declines while employment rises indicates labor hoarding and productivity collapse, signaling economic inefficiency and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of periods when INDPRO falls and PAYEMS rises simultaneously, or cross-sectional rank correlation remains below 0.02.
